title: achillea umbellata subsp. umbellata
intro: Achillea umbellata subsp. umbellata, also known as the yarrow fern or fernleaf yarrow, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a subspecies of the yarrow plant, characterized by its fern-like leaves and white or yellowish flowers. The medicinal properties of Achillea umbellata subsp. umbellata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
